fields.name: invoice_number
fields.description: The unique identifier for the invoice, typically labeled as 'Invoice Number', 'Invoice #', or 'Nr faktury'

fields.name: invoice_date
fields.description: The date when the invoice was issued, in YYYY-MM-DD format

fields.name: due_date
fields.description: The payment due date for the invoice, in YYYY-MM-DD format

fields.name: supplier_name
fields.description: The name of the company or individual issuing the invoice

fields.name: supplier_address
fields.description: The full address of the supplier

fields.name: supplier_tax_id
fields.description: The tax identification number of the supplier (VAT number, NIP, etc.)

fields.name: customer_name
fields.description: The name of the customer or company receiving the invoice

fields.name: customer_address
fields.description: The full address of the customer

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: The total amount before taxes and discounts

fields.name: tax_amount
fields.description: The total tax amount (VAT, sales tax, etc.)

fields.name: total_amount
fields.description: The final total amount including all taxes and fees

fields.name: currency
fields.description: The currency code (USD, EUR, PLN, etc.)

tables.name: Invoice Items
tables.description: Line items on the invoice with descriptions, quantities, prices, and amounts

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Description of the product or service

columns.name: Total
columns.description: Total amount for this line item
